speaker: seller

args.message: Step right up! Feast your eyes on this magnificent 2016 Chevrolet Tahoe LT. This beauty isn't just a vehicle; it's a statement. With its luxurious leather interior, premium Bose sound system, and the rugged capability of a 5.3L V8, it’s built for families on the go and adventures that await. This SUV runs strong and has been meticulously dealer-serviced. Come on, take a closer look!

args.message: Absolutely! This Tahoe has been on a strict diet of regular oil changes every 5,000 miles, just as the dealership recommended. The previous owner was meticulous about maintenance. No major repairs to speak of, just routine stuff – the kind of upkeep you'd expect on a well-loved vehicle like this. It runs like a top!
